7766 // Token: 0x0600318E RID: 12686 RVA: 0x005DA240 File Offset: 0x005D8440
7767 private bool IsWindBlocked(int x, int y)
7768 {
7769 Tile tile = Main.tile[x, y];
7770 return tile == null || (tile.wall > 0 && !WallID.Sets.AllowsWind[(int)tile.wall]) || (double)y > Main.worldSurface;
7771 }
7772
7773 // Token: 0x0600318F RID: 12687 RVA: 0x005DA284 File Offset: 0x005D8484
7774 private int GetWaterAnimalCageFrame(int x, int y, int tileFrameX, int tileFrameY)
7775 {
7776 int num = x - tileFrameX / 18;
7777 int num2 = y - tileFrameY / 18;
7778 return num / 2 * (num2 / 3) % Main.cageFrames;
7779 }
7780
7781 // Token: 0x06003190 RID: 12688 RVA: 0x005DA2AC File Offset: 0x005D84AC
7782 private int GetSmallAnimalCageFrame(int x, int y, int tileFrameX, int tileFrameY)
7783 {
7784 int num = x - tileFrameX / 18;
7785 int num2 = y - tileFrameY / 18;
7786 return num / 3 * (num2 / 3) % Main.cageFrames;
7787 }
7788
7789 // Token: 0x06003191 RID: 12689 RVA: 0x005DA2D4 File Offset: 0x005D84D4
7790 private int GetBigAnimalCageFrame(int x, int y, int tileFrameX, int tileFrameY)
7791 {
7792 int num = x - tileFrameX / 18;
7793 int num2 = y - tileFrameY / 18;
7794 return num / 6 * (num2 / 4) % Main.cageFrames;
7795 }
7796
7797 // Token: 0x06003192 RID: 12690 RVA: 0x005DA2FC File Offset: 0x005D84FC
7798 public static void GetScreenDrawArea(bool useOffscreenRange, out Vector2 drawOffSet, out int firstTileX, out int lastTileX, out int firstTileY, out int lastTileY)
7799 {
7800 Vector2 scaledPosition = Main.Camera.ScaledPosition;
7801 Vector2 scaledSize = Main.Camera.ScaledSize;
7802 drawOffSet = (useOffscreenRange ? new Vector2((float)Main.offScreenRange, (float)Main.offScreenRange) : Vector2.Zero);
7803 firstTileX = (int)((scaledPosition.X - drawOffSet.X) / 16f - 1f);
7804 lastTileX = (int)((scaledPosition.X + scaledSize.X + drawOffSet.X) / 16f) + 2;
7805 firstTileY = (int)((scaledPosition.Y - drawOffSet.Y) / 16f - 1f);
7806 lastTileY = (int)((scaledPosition.Y + scaledSize.Y + drawOffSet.Y) / 16f) + 5;
7807 if (firstTileX < 4)
7808 {
7809 firstTileX = 4;
7810 }
7811 if (lastTileX > Main.maxTilesX - 4)
7812 {
7813 lastTileX = Main.maxTilesX - 4;

8989 // Token: 0x0600319A RID: 12698 RVA: 0x005DD2B4 File Offset: 0x005DB4B4
8990 private void EmitLivingTreeLeaf_Below(int x, int y, int leafGoreType)
8991 {
8992 Tile tile = Main.tile[x, y + 1];
8993 if (WorldGen.SolidTile(tile) || tile.liquid > 0)
8994 {
8995 return;
8996 }
8997 float windForVisuals = Main.WindForVisuals;
8998 if (windForVisuals < -0.2f && (WorldGen.SolidTile(Main.tile[x - 1, y + 1]) || WorldGen.SolidTile(Main.tile[x - 2, y + 1])))
8999 {
9000 return;
9001 }
9002 if (windForVisuals > 0.2f && (WorldGen.SolidTile(Main.tile[x + 1, y + 1]) || WorldGen.SolidTile(Main.tile[x + 2, y + 1])))
9003 {

10024 }

11494 int num2 = Dust.NewDust(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 16, 14, 0f, 0f, 100, default(Color), 0.2f);
11495 this._dust[num2].fadeIn = 1.2f;
11496 }
11497 if (this._rand.Next(75) == 0)
11498 {
11499 int num3 = Dust.NewDust(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 16, 27, 0f, 0f, 100, default(Color), 1f);
11500 Dust dust3 = this._dust[num3];
11501 dust3.velocity.X = dust3.velocity.X / 2f;
11502 Dust dust4 = this._dust[num3];
11503 dust4.velocity.Y = dust4.velocity.Y / 2f;
11504 }
11505 }
11506 if (style == 4 && this._rand.Next(150) == 0)
11507 {
11508 int num4 = Dust.NewDust(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 8, 16, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
11509 Dust dust5 = this._dust[num4];
11510 dust5.velocity.X = dust5.velocity.X / 3f;
11511 Dust dust6 = this._dust[num4];
11512 dust6.velocity.Y = dust6.velocity.Y / 3f;
11513 Dust dust7 = this._dust[num4];
11514 dust7.velocity.Y = dust7.velocity.Y - 0.7f;
11515 this._dust[num4].alpha = 50;
11516 this._dust[num4].scale *= 0.1f;
11517 this._dust[num4].fadeIn = 0.9f;
11518 this._dust[num4].noGravity = true;
11519 }
11520 if (style == 5 && this._rand.Next(40) == 0)
11521 {
11522 int num5 = Dust.NewDust(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16 - 6)), 16, 16, 6, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1.5f);
11523 Dust dust8 = this._dust[num5];
11524 dust8.velocity.Y = dust8.velocity.Y - 2f;
11525 this._dust[num5].noGravity = true;
11526 }
11527 if (style == 6 && this._rand.Next(30) == 0)
11528 {
11529 Color color = new Color(50, 255, 255, 255);
11530 int num6 = Dust.NewDust(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 16, 43, 0f, 0f, 254, color, 0.5f);
11531 this._dust[num6].velocity *= 0f;
11532 }
11533 }
